function.name: bash
function.description:
Execute safe bash commands for exploring the filesystem and terminal operations.

Use this for any command-line operations including:
- Directory exploration: ls, find, tree
- File inspection: cat, head, tail, wc, file
- Content search: grep, rg (ripgrep)

Examples:
- grep -rn 'button' app/views
- find . -name '*.rb' -type f
- ls -la app/

Whitelisted commands: ls, pwd, find, tree, cat, head, tail, wc, file, which, echo, grep, rg

command.description:
The bash command to execute. Examples:
- 'grep -rn "button" app/views' (search for text in files)
- 'find . -name "*.rb"' (find files by name)
- 'ls -la app/' (list directory contents)
